Chart.Additional vias: Three holes for 1.3 mm fiber optic ferrules or screws. Two optical stimulation outputs, one electrical stimulator output.
Chart.Compatible Headstages: `ONIX Headstage Ephys 64ch <https://open-ephys.github.io/channel-maps-docs/headstages/oeps-7741.html>`_, `SPI Headstage 64ch Low Profile <https://open-ephys.github.io/channel-maps-docs/headstages/oeps-6570.html>`_, `SPI Headstage 64ch Low Profile with 3D <https://open-ephys.github.io/channel-maps-docs/headstages/oeps-6571.html>`_

Chart.Additional vias: Three holes for 1.25 mm fiber optic ferrules and two holes for screws.
Chart.Compatible Headstages: `SPI Headstage 32ch <https://open-ephys.github.io/channel-maps-docs/headstages/oeps-6573.html>`_, `SPI Headstage 32ch with 3D <https://open-ephys.github.io/channel-maps-docs/headstages/oeps-6576.html>`_, `SPI Headstage 16ch Bipolar <https://open-ephys.github.io/channel-maps-docs/headstages/oeps-6574.html>`_, `SPI Headstage 16ch Bipolar with 3D <https://open-ephys.github.io/channel-maps-docs/headstages/oeps-6577.html>`_, `ONIX Headstage 32ch Stim/Record <https://open-ephys.github.io/channel-maps-docs/headstages/oeps-7746.html>`_

Chart.Additional vias: Hole for 0.70 mm fiber optic ferrule?
